title: rinorea neglecta
intro: Rinorea neglecta, also known as the Neglected Rinorea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues. Rinorea neglecta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of forms.
